params.description: Minis characters appear in animated counting scenario. Scene shows items to count in three categories.

steps.text: The Minis are here. Let's count what we see. Use the counter to track each category.

elements.description: Minis counting game displayed. Three categories of items visible. Up/down counter interface ready.

params.description: Guide counts visually. Animation highlights and counts each category in sequence, revealing correct totals.

steps.text: Let's see if you counted them all. There were [X] [category A] and [Y] [category B] and [Z] [category C]. Now we have our data.

elements.description: Minis counting scene. All three categories counted and confirmed. Correct totals displayed.
